title: Suspicious Bank Email
description: Email pretending to be Chase bank asking for login credentials and warning that the account will be locked.
summary: This report appears to describe a phishing attempt aimed at collecting sensitive account information.
next_steps: Do not click any links or attachments
Verify the sender through an official channel
Change your password and enable two-factor authentication if needed

title: Fake Tech Support Call
description: Caller claimed to be Microsoft support and asked for remote access to fix a device issue.
summary: Users reported scam calls pretending to be technical support.
next_steps: Hang up immediately
Do not grant remote access
Report the phone number

title: Public WiFi Security Concern
description: Users noticed a suspicious open WiFi network in the apartment building lobby that looked similar to the building network.
summary: Users noticed a suspicious open WiFi network that may be unsafe.
next_steps: Avoid connecting to the unknown network
Use a trusted WiFi network or VPN
Review device security settings

title: Crypto Investment Message
description: Telegram account promised guaranteed crypto profits and pushed users to deposit funds quickly.
summary: Users reported unsolicited messages promising unrealistic crypto investment returns.
next_steps: Do not send money or personal details
Verify the organization independently
Report the account to the platform

title: Package Theft Alert
description: Residents reported several missing packages and a suspicious individual near the mailroom entrance.
summary: Residents reported repeated package theft concerns near a shared delivery area.
next_steps: Stay alert near the delivery area
Document any useful details if safe
Notify building management or local authorities if needed

title: Account Verification Text Scam
description: Text message claimed an email account would be suspended unless the user verified credentials through a link.
summary: Users reported text-based phishing attempts requesting account verification through suspicious links.
next_steps: Do not open the link
Verify account status through the official website
Change credentials if you already interacted with the message

title: Shopping Site
description: Do not open the link, Verify account status
summary: This report appears to describe a phishing attempt aimed at collecting sensitive account information.
next_steps: Do not click any links or attachments

title: Network
description: Users reported text-based phishing attempts when visiting a site
summary: This report describes a safety concern, but the exact type is unclear. A general precautionary response is recommended.
next_steps: Review the situation carefully before acting
Avoid sharing sensitive information until verified

title: Crypto Investment Message
description: I received a message promising guaranteed crypto profits if I invest immediately.
summary: This report appears to involve an unsolicited or suspicious investment offer promising unrealistic returns.
next_steps: Do not send money or personal details
